entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: PEANUT BUD NECROSIS DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of peanut plants to resist peanut bud necrosis disease (PBND).

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General agricultural characteristics of the peanut plants.

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The frequency or occurrence of peanut bud necrosis disease in the population.

entities.name: YIELD TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics related to the productivity of the peanut crop.

entities.name: QTL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of identifying quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits.

entities.name: QTL CARTOGRAPHER
entities.description: Software used for quantitative trait loci analysis.

entities.name: QTL NETWORK
entities.description: Software used for quantitative trait loci analysis.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population of lines derived from crossing two parents and selfing to achieve homozygosity.

entities.name: Q60DI
entities.description: A specific quantitative trait locus identified for disease incidence.

entities.name: LG_AHII
entities.description: A linkage group where the q60DI locus is located.

entities.name: Q90DI
entities.description: A specific quantitative trait locus identified for disease incidence with high PVE.

entities.name: NATURAL INFESTATION OF THRIPS
entities.description: The presence of thrips in the environment causing disease pressure.

entities.name: THRIPS
entities.description: The insect vector responsible for spreading peanut bud necrosis disease.

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic makeup of the peanut lines.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external conditions affecting the growth and disease spread of the crop.

entities.name: GENOTYPE X ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of genetic makeup and environmental conditions on traits.

entities.name: ADDITIVE X ADDITIVE INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Genetic interactions between additive effects of alleles at different loci.

entities.name: PVE
entities.description: Phenotypic Variance Explained, a measure of the effect of a QTL on a trait.
